allow: Bash(echo "--- OS info ---"; cat /etc/os-release | head -3; echo "--- snap/apt ---"; which snap apt 2>&1; echo "--- /usr/lib/flutter or similar ---"; ls -d /usr/lib/flutter /opt/flutter ~/flutter ~/snap/flutter 2>&1 | head -5; echo "--- nvm ---"; ls -d ~/.nvm 2>&1; echo "--- disk free in home ---"; df -h ~ | tail -1)
